display_text: Samurai Tabi, Cost: 5250: Provides an active ability with a 0.1 second cast time and no cooldown that grants a stacking bonus of 3 to all stats every 0.1 seconds up to 8 times, for a total bonus of 24 stats over 0.8 seconds. The item also has three unique intelligence, strength, and agility-based passive effects. Stats: Cost: 5250, Active Cast: Instant.

display_text: Samurai Tabi, Cost: 5250: A multi-purpose combat item providing stat scaling, control, damage, and retaliation. The active stat steroid empowers short fights, the passive root provides catch, the counterattack punishes aggression, and the periodic intelligence-based magic damage offers consistent AoE pressure. Stats: Root Cooldown: 4s, Damage Interval: 4s.

display_text: Samurai Tabi, Cost: 5250: The intelligence passive deals 125 magical damage to up to 2 targets within 700 range every 4 seconds, making it effective against squishy enemy cores or supports who cluster in fights. This provides consistent magical damage pressure alongside physical damage from attacks.

display_text: Samurai Tabi, Cost: 5250: The strength passive has a 20% chance on-hit to root the target for 1.0 second, providing reliable soft disable. This makes it effective for chasing down mobile heroes or locking down key targets in a fight, offering initiation and catch potential.

display_text: Samurai Tabi, Cost: 5250: The agility passive provides a 20% chance to counterattack incoming attacks, dealing 80 bonus physical damage. This makes the item valuable for heroes who are often attacked or focused, providing a deterrent against being right-clicked and punishing physical damage dealers.

display_text: Samurai Tabi, Cost: 5250: Suitable for universal heroes or cores who benefit from all attributes and have a balance of spellcasting and right-click damage.
